revision.text:
'''壬寅'''（みずのえとら、じんいん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて39番目で、前は[[辛丑]]、次は[[癸卯]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は水、[[十二支]]の五行は木で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（水生木）である。
==壬寅の年==
==壬寅の日== ===[[選日]]=== 壬寅の日は[[天一天上]]の10日目である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings
revision.text: #redirect[[en:壬寅]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''壬寅'''（みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの39番目で、前は[[辛丑]]、次は[[癸卯]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[寅]]は陽の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（水生木）である。
==壬寅の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って42が余る年が壬寅の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''壬寅の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[42年]] *[[102年]] *[[162年]] *[[222年]] *[[282年]] *[[342年]] *[[402年]] *[[462年]] *[[522年]] *[[582年]] *[[642年]] *[[702年]] *[[762年]] *[[822年]] *[[882年]] *[[942年]] | *[[1002年]] *[[1062年]] *[[1122年]] *[[1182年]] *[[1242年]] *[[1302年]] *[[1362年]] *[[1422年]] *[[1482年]] *[[1542年]] *[[1602年]] *[[1662年]] *[[1722年]] *[[1782年]] *[[1842年]] *[[1902年]] *[[1962年]] | *[[2022年]] *[[2082年]] *[[2142年]] *[[2202年]] *[[2262年]] *[[2322年]] *[[2382年]] *[[2442年]] *[[2502年]] *[[2562年]] *[[2622年]] *[[2682年]] *[[2742年]] *[[2802年]] *[[2862年]] *[[2922年]] *[[2982年]] |}
==壬寅の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[1月]]が壬寅の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立春]]から[[啓蟄]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==壬寅の日== ===選日=== 壬寅の日は[[天一天上]]の10日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:壬寅]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:壬寅]]

==壬寅の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[1月]]が壬寅の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立春]]から[[啓蟄]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==壬寅の日== ===選日=== 壬寅の日は[[天一天上]]の10日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Tiger-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:壬寅]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Tiger-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]] [[ja:壬寅]]

Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの39番目で、前は[[辛丑]]、次は[[癸卯]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[寅]]は陽の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（水生木）である。

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''壬寅'''（みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん）は、[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの39番目で、前は[[辛丑]]、次は[[癸卯]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[寅]]は陽の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（水生木）である。
==壬寅の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って42が余る年が壬寅の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''壬寅の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[42年]] *[[102年]] *[[162年]] *[[222年]] *[[282年]] *[[342年]] *[[402年]] *[[462年]] *[[522年]] *[[582年]] *[[642年]] *[[702年]] *[[762年]] *[[822年]] *[[882年]] *[[942年]] | *[[1002年]] *[[1062年]] *[[1122年]] *[[1182年]] *[[1242年]] *[[1302年]] *[[1362年]] *[[1422年]] *[[1482年]] *[[1542年]] *[[1602年]] *[[1662年]] *[[1722年]] *[[1782年]] *[[1842年]] *[[1902年]] *[[1962年]] | *[[2022年]] *[[2082年]] *[[2142年]] *[[2202年]] *[[2262年]] *[[2322年]] *[[2382年]] *[[2442年]] *[[2502年]] *[[2562年]] *[[2622年]] *[[2682年]] *[[2742年]] *[[2802年]] *[[2862年]] *[[2922年]] *[[2982年]] |}
==壬寅の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[1月]]が壬寅の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立春]]から[[啓蟄]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==壬寅の日== ===選日=== 壬寅の日は[[天一天上]]の10日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Tiger-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:壬寅]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Tiger-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Water Tiger}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:壬寅]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Water Tiger]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-ìng]][[de:Wasser-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-yìm]][[ja:壬寅]][[ko:임인]][[vi:Nhâm Dần]][[za:Nyaemzyinz]][[zh_min_nan:Jîm-în]][[zh_yue:壬寅]][[zh:壬寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062922]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Tiger|kanji=壬寅|romaji=mizunoe tora|onyomi=jin’in|p=rényín|w=jen-yin|mi=ʐən³⁵ ȵin²¹|y=jam4 jan4|j=jam4 jan4|ci=jɐm jɐn|mc=ɲiɪm in|oc-bs=ɲɨm in|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Water Tiger also known as Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: jin'in ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-ìng]][[de:Wasser-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-yìm]][[ja:壬寅]][[ko:임인]][[vi:Nhâm Dần]][[za:Nyaemzyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-în]][[zh_yue:壬寅]][[zh:壬寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062922]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Tiger|kanji=壬寅|romaji=mizunoe tora|onyomi=jin’in|p=rényín|w=jen-yin|mi=ʐən³⁵ ȵin²¹|y=jam4 jan4|j=jam4 jan4|ci=jɐm jɐn|mc=ɲiɪm in|oc-bs=ɲɨm in|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Water Tiger also known as Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: jin'in ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: jin'in ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: jin'in ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: jin'in ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-ìng]][[de:Wasser-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-yìm]][[ja:壬寅]][[ko:임인]][[vi:Nhâm Dần]][[za:Nyaemzyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-în]][[zh-yue:壬寅]][[zh:壬寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062922]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Tiger|kanji=壬寅|romaji=mizunoe tora|onyomi=jin’in|p=rényín|w=jen-yin|mi=ʐən³⁵ ȵin²¹|y=jam4 jan4|j=jam4 jan4|ci=jɐm jɐn|mc=ɲiɪm in|oc-bs=ɲɨm in|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Water Tiger also known as Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: jin'in ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-ìng]][[de:Wasser-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-yìm]][[ja:壬寅]][[ko:임인]][[vi:Nhâm Dần]][[za:Nyaemzyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-în]][[zh-yue:壬寅]][[zh:壬寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062922]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Tiger|kanji=壬寅|romaji=mizunoe tora|onyomi=jin’in|p=rényín|w=jen-yin|mi=ʐən³⁵ ȵin²¹|y=jam4 jan4|j=jam4 jan4|ci=jɐm jɐn|mc=ɲiɪm in|oc-bs=ɲɨm in|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Water Tiger also known as Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: jin'in ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần
<!-- == * Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえとら (mizunoe-tora) ***Onyomi: じんかのとら (jinka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: じんいん (jinin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Water Tiger== A [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year that leaves a remainder of 42 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Water Tiger Year''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-ìng]][[de:Wasser-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-yìm]][[ja:壬寅]][[ko:임인]][[vi:Nhâm Dần]][[za:Nyaemzyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-în]][[zh-yue:壬寅]][[zh:壬寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062922]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Tiger|kanji=壬寅|romaji=mizunoe tora|onyomi=jin’in|p=rényín|w=jen-yin|mi=ʐən³⁵ ȵin²¹|y=jam4 jan4|j=jam4 jan4|ci=jɐm jɐn|mc=ɲiɪm in|oc-bs=ɲɨm in|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Water Tiger also known as Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: jin'in ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần
<!-- == * Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえとら (mizunoe-tora) ***Onyomi: じんかのとら (jinka-no-tora) ***Onyomi: じんいん (jinin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Water Tiger== A [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year that leaves a remainder of 42 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Water Tiger Year''' |- ! AD|ja|2142年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2142 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11177}} * {{ill|2202 AD|ja|2922年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2922 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2982 AD|ja|2982年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2982 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}
==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).

In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: jin'in ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

--> ==Years of Yang Water Tiger== A [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year that leaves a remainder of 42 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Water Tiger Year''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: jin'in ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-ìng]][[de:Wasser-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-yìm]][[ja:壬寅]][[ko:임인]][[vi:Nhâm Dần]][[za:Nyaemzyinz]][[zh_min_nan:Jîm-în]][[zh_yue:壬寅]][[zh:壬寅]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-ìng]][[de:Wasser-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-yìm]][[ja:壬寅]][[ko:임인]][[vi:Nhâm Dần]][[za:Nyaemzyinz]][[zh_min_nan:Jîm-în]][[zh_yue:壬寅]][[zh:壬寅]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-ìng]][[de:Wasser-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-yìm]][[ja:壬寅]][[ko:임인]][[vi:Nhâm Dần]][[za:Nyaemzyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-în]][[zh-yue:壬寅]][[zh:壬寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062922]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Tiger|kanji=壬寅|romaji=mizunoe tora|onyomi=jin’in|p=rényín|w=jen-yin|mi=ʐən³⁵ ȵin²¹|y=jam4 jan4|j=jam4 jan4|ci=jɐm jɐn|mc=ɲiɪm in|oc-bs=ɲɨm in|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Water Tiger also known as Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: jin'in ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: jin'in ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

--> ==Years of Yang Water Tiger== A [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year that leaves a remainder of 42 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Water Tiger Year''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: jin'in ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

==Months of Yang Water Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).
==Days of Yang Water Tiger== === Selected Day === The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Tiger also known as  Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}}'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: jin'in
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

==Months of Yang Water Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January}} is considered the Yang Water Tiger {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}).

==Days of Yang Water Tiger==
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Tiger|kanji=壬寅|romaji=mizunoe tora|onyomi=jin’in|p=rényín|w=jen-yin|mi=ʐən³⁵ ȵin²¹|y=jam4 jan4|j=jam4 jan4|ci=jɐm jɐn|mc=ɲiɪm in|oc-bs=ɲɨm in|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Tiger also known as  Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}}'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: jin'in
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

<!--

***Onyomi: じんかのとら (jinka-no-tora)
***Onyomi: じんいん (jinin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): imin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

-->

==Months of Yang Water Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January}} is considered the Yang Water Tiger {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}).

==Days of Yang Water Tiger==
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Water Tiger also known as  Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}}'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.

==Months of Yang Water Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January}} is considered the Yang Water Tiger {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}).

==Days of Yang Water Tiger==
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Tiger|kanji=壬寅|romaji=mizunoe tora|onyomi=jin’in|p=rényín|w=jen-yin|mi=ʐən³⁵ ȵin²¹|y=jam4 jan4|j=jam4 jan4|ci=jɐm jɐn|mc=ɲiɪm in|oc-bs=ɲɨm in|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Tiger also known as  Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}}'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: jin'in
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

***Onyomi: じんいん (jinin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): imin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

-->

However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}).

==Months of Yang Water Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January}} is considered the Yang Water Tiger {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}).

==Days of Yang Water Tiger==
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Tiger|kanji=壬寅|romaji=mizunoe tora|onyomi=jin’in|p=rényín|w=jen-yin|mi=ʐən³⁵ ȵin²¹|y=jam4 jan4|j=jam4 jan4|ci=jɐm jɐn|mc=ɲiɪm in|oc-bs=ɲɨm in|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Tiger also known as  Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: jin'in
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

<!--
==
* Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのえとら (mizunoe-tora)
***Onyomi: じんかのとら (jinka-no-tora)
***Onyomi: じんいん (jinin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): imin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

-->

'''Yang Water Tiger also known as  Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: jin'in
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

==Months of Yang Water Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January|1=January}} is considered the Yang Water Tiger {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}).

==Days of Yang Water Tiger==
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Tiger|kanji=壬寅|romaji=mizunoe tora|onyomi=jin’in|p=rényín|w=jen-yin|mi=ʐən³⁵ ȵin²¹|y=jam4 jan4|j=jam4 jan4|ci=jɐm jɐn|mc=ɲiɪm in|oc-bs=ɲɨm in|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Tiger also known as  Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|癸卯|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}'s {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: jin'in
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

<!--
==
* Yang Water Tiger (壬寅) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのえとら (mizunoe-tora)
***Onyomi: じんかのとら (jinka-no-tora)
***Onyomi: じんいん (jinin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): imin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

-->
==Years of Yang Water Tiger==
A {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year that leaves a remainder of 42 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Water Tiger {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}}.

==Months of Yang Water Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January|1=January}} is considered the Yang Water Tiger {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}).

==Days of Yang Water Tiger==
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
